description: Karaite betrothal deed. Dated Monday, 8th Adar I 5398 AM (1638 CE). Mordekhay b. El'azar b. Aharon betroths Esther bt. Ya'aqov b. Avraham. Unlike most Karaite early modern betrothal documents, where Esther appears as part of the nomenclature formula honorifics, it appears the bride's given name is Esther in this case. The groom's marital payments are listed as: 50 kesif + 200 medin + 1000 medin. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
